artifact_classification: authoritative for bounded recovery routing and normalized common-frame interpretation only

approval_chain.flamestrike_delegation: you make the decision based on evidence ... and present it to me for approval

approved_rule.purpose: Provide a deterministic dimensionless common-frame interpretation for the approved primary-owner upright traces without claiming missing source-to-target evidence.
approved_rule.parameter_rule: Preserve each exact source trace formula and symbolic parameter t; register v = t, identify t = 0 with K80 and t = 1 with N3, and preserve owner-view side and within-side ordering under the exact Step 05 handedness convention.
approved_rule.primary_owner_policy: Front primary_XZ and left primary_YZ traces are the only construction-owner inputs for this bridge.
approved_rule.validation_policy: Back and right traces remain validation-only holdouts. They may test declared side, ordering, handedness, non-crossing behavior, and explicit contradiction, but may not generate independent construction coordinates.
approved_rule.source_evidence_effect: No source pixel, endpoint, trace formula, contact sample, measurement, or prior authority changes.
approved_rule.interpretation_effect: Creates authority only for a later deterministic normalized common-frame mapping record; it does not create physical source-to-target correspondence.
approved_rule.gate_failure_policy: Stop on duplicate construction mapping, owner-order reversal, trace crossing, handedness failure, changed source trace data, or explicit validation-view contradiction. Missing physical correspondence is preserved as missing evidence and is not silently inferred.

explicitly_rejected_routes: proof-only scale-recovery transforms as source-to-target authority
S10R-003-B owner-view endpoint constrained physical mapping

block_effect.blueprint_effect: Supplies a bounded interpretation route; does not manufacture the missing source authority.
